notes: Can go to the main menu, but the game freezes as soon as you start a new game. It's apparently related to this bug: https://bugs.winehq.org/show_bug.cgi?id=45345
title: GRIS

notes: The game locks with a blank screen when starting a video, which prevent starting a new game. I played the first chapter on Windows and continued from there with Proton. It went flawlessly until I encountered a new video, getting stuck on a blank screen again. I tried the '-force-d3d9' workaround mentioned here https://bugs.winehq.org/show_bug.cgi?id=45345 but it didn't work.
title: GRIS

notes:
it work well if you choose chapter instead new game, looks like video isn't working

title: GRIS

notes: The game runs pretty well with no tweaks needed. I continued playing it from a save I already had previously and the only problem I faced was a freeze on a black screen when trying to exit the game, which I overcame by force exiting it after clicking on the window "close" button more than one time.
title: GRIS
